aspects.action_positive: Tang ngan sach cho kenh van chuyen dang duoc danh gia tot va gan nhan giao nhanh.
aspects.action_neutral: Theo doi SLA giao hang theo khu vuc va thu thap them review.
aspects.action_negative: Mo ticket voi doi logistics, kiem tra SLA va cap nhat ETA chu dong cho khach.

aspects.action_positive: Uu tien day san pham vao danh muc de xuat va campaign social proof.
aspects.action_neutral: Kiem tra ty le loi theo lo hang de xac minh xu huong.
aspects.action_negative: Kich hoat quy trinh QA, khoa lo hang co rui ro va thong bao doi cung ung.

aspects.action_positive: Nhan rong combo va upsell theo phan khuc gia khach hang chap nhan.
aspects.action_neutral: Thu nghiem A/B gia va voucher de tim diem can bang chuyen doi.
aspects.action_negative: Ra soat gia doi thu, can nhac voucher bo sung va toi uu bundle.

aspects.action_positive: Nhan rong script ho tro hieu qua sang cac kenh chat/email.
aspects.action_neutral: Theo doi FRT va CSAT theo ca truc de cai tien lien tuc.
aspects.action_negative: Dao tao lai quy trinh cham soc, bo sung checklist xu ly khieu nai.

aspects.action_positive: Duy tri tieu chuan dong goi va dua vao quy trinh default.
aspects.action_neutral: Danh gia xac suat hu hong theo don vi van chuyen.
aspects.action_negative: Cap nhat tieu chuan bao bi, bo sung vat lieu chong soc va audit kho.
